memberdef.argsstring: (IOnlineSessionPtr Session, int32 LocalUserNum, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &SearchResult, FARSessionResult &OutResult)
memberdef.name: BeginJoinSession

briefdescription.para: Server/client session orchestration surface for Steam/LAN/local multiplayer.
